0111100111111010001110000000110010010101001101 - ASI: 22

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 1 * 00
  0010 = 0 * 010
  1101 = 11 * 01
  00011 = 00 * 011
  01010 = 01 * 010
  01111 = 011 * 11
  001111 = 0 * 01111
  0000011 = 00 * 00011
  1001101 = 100 * 1101
  00011100 = 00011 * 100
  00000110010 = 0000011 * 0010
  01111001111 = 01111 * 001111
  010101001101 = 01010 * 1001101
  110100011100 = 1101 * 00011100
  00000110010010101001101 = 00000110010 * 010101001101
  01111001111110100011100 = 01111001111 * 110100011100
  0111100111111010001110000000110010010101001101 = 01111001111110100011100 * 00000110010010101001101
